description: A practical course on Kubernetes networking internals and CNI. Covers the flat networking model, how the kubelet and container runtime invoke CNI plugins to assign Pod IPs, and a hands-on comparison of Flannel, Calico, and Cilium so you can choose the right plugin for your cluster.
target_audience: Intermediate learners who are already comfortable with Kubernetes basics (Pod and Service concepts assumed)

lectures.title: Kubernetes Networking and CNI: How a Pod Gets Its Network
